'''鈭歫-r-ch''' ('''kajarach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dagnab|dagnab]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dagnab|dagnab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-r-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kajarach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijarach|thijarach]] || [[word:jijarach|jijarach]] || [[word:shijarach|shijarach]] || [[word:kijarach|kijarach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujarach|thuthujarach]] || [[word:jujujarach|jujujarach]] || [[word:shushujarach|shushujarach]] || [[word:kukujarach|kukujarach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujarach|thujarach]] || [[word:jujarach|jujarach]] || [[word:shujarach|shujarach]] || [[word:kujarach|kujarach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujarach|thujarach]] || [[word:jujarach|jujarach]] || [[word:shujarach|shujarach]] || [[word:kujarach|kujarach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejarach|thejarach]] || [[word:jejarach|jejarach]] || [[word:shejarach|shejarach]] || [[word:kejarach|kejarach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojarach|thothojarach]] || [[word:jojojarach|jojojarach]] || [[word:shoshojarach|shoshojarach]] || [[word:kokojarach|kokojarach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojarach|thojarach]] || [[word:jojarach|jojarach]] || [[word:shojarach|shojarach]] || [[word:kojarach|kojarach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojarach|thojarach]] || [[word:jojarach|jojarach]] || [[word:shojarach|shojarach]] || [[word:kojarach|kojarach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]] || [[word:jarach|jarach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jarach|th忙jarach]] || [[word:j忙jarach|j忙jarach]] || [[word:sh忙jarach|sh忙jarach]] || [[word:k忙jarach|k忙jarach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajarach|thathajarach]] || [[word:jajajarach|jajajarach]] || [[word:shashajarach|shashajarach]] || [[word:kakajarach|kakajarach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajarach|thajarach]] || [[word:jajarach|jajarach]] || [[word:shajarach|shajarach]] || [[word:kajarach|kajarach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajarach|thajarach]] || [[word:jajarach|jajarach]] || [[word:shajarach|shajarach]] || [[word:kajarach|kajarach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajarach|shajarach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajarach|goshajarach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajarach|gokishajarach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajarachn眉|shajarachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajarachnkn眉|goshajarachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajarachn眉|gokishajarachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajarachsh毛|shajarachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajarachnksh毛|goshajarachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajarachsh毛|gokishajarachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajarachro|shajarachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajarachnkro|goshajarachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajarachro|gokishajarachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajarachmu|shajarachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajarachnkmu|goshajarachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajarachmu|gokishajarachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajarachsher|shajarachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajarachnksher|goshajarachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajarachsher|gokishajarachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajarachng|shajarachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajarachnkng|goshajarachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajarachng|gokishajarachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajarachya|shajarachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajarachnkya|goshajarachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajarachya|gokishajarachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajarachyam|shajarachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajarachnkyam|goshajarachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajarachyam|gokishajarachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajarachn眉sh毛|shajarachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajarachnkn眉sh毛|goshajarachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajarachn眉sh毛|gokishajarachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajarachn眉ro|shajarachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajarachnkn眉ro|goshajarachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajarachn眉ro|gokishajarachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajarachn眉mu|shajarachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajarachnkn眉mu|goshajarachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajarachn眉mu|gokishajarachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajarachsh毛n眉|shajarachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajarachnksh毛n眉|goshajarachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajarachsh毛n眉|gokishajarachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajarachsh毛ro|shajarachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajarachnksh毛ro|goshajarachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajarachsh毛ro|gokishajarachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajarachsh毛mu|shajarachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajarachnksh毛mu|goshajarachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajarachsh毛mu|gokishajarachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajarachron眉|shajarachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajarachnkron眉|goshajarachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajarachron眉|gokishajarachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajarachrosh毛|shajarachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajarachnkrosh毛|goshajarachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajarachrosh毛|gokishajarachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajarachromu|shajarachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajarachnkromu|goshajarachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajarachromu|gokishajarachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajarachmun眉|shajarachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajarachnkmun眉|goshajarachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajarachmun眉|gokishajarachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajarachmush毛|shajarachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajarachnkmush毛|goshajarachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajarachmush毛|gokishajarachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajarachmuro|shajarachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajarachnkmuro|goshajarachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajarachmuro|gokishajarachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
